## Summary

Describe the public, architectural, or implementation outcome.

## Related records

- Specification:
- Task or issue:
- Claim or experiment:

## Evidence

- [ ] Tests or validation output are linked.
- [ ] Screenshots or measurements are attached when applicable.
- [ ] New assumptions are recorded as claims or experiments.

## Architecture checks

- [ ] No Android/Linux/POSIX types leaked into portable native contracts.
- [ ] Hardware-specific code stays behind board or device-service boundaries.
- [ ] Security, licensing, privacy, and redistribution implications were reviewed.

## Publication checks

- [ ] Stable IDs and anchors are present.
- [ ] Cross-links resolve.
- [ ] Portal validation passes.
